questions.question: Please introduce yourself and talk about what you do for a living.
questions.hint: 可以用 I'm a... / I work as... / I work for... 等本课学到的句型
questions.sampleAnswer: Hi, I'm Lisa. I'm a software engineer. I work for a tech company in Shanghai. I'm responsible for developing mobile applications and managing our development team.

questions.question: Describe where you work and what company you work for. Use 'work for', 'work at', and 'work in' correctly.
questions.hint: 注意三个介词的区别：for 跟公司/雇主，at 跟地点，in 跟行业/领域
questions.sampleAnswer: I work for a multinational consulting firm called Deloitte. I work at their Beijing office, which is located downtown. I work in the finance department, specifically in auditing.

questions.question: What are you responsible for at your job? Describe your main duties.
questions.hint: 用 I'm responsible for + 动名词（doing）来描述你的工作职责
questions.sampleAnswer: I'm responsible for hiring and training new employees. I'm also responsible for managing our team's budget and making sure we meet our quarterly goals.

questions.question: Imagine you run your own business. Describe it in English.
questions.hint: 可以用 self-employed / run my own business / own a business 等表达
questions.sampleAnswer: I'm self-employed. I run my own design studio. I create logos and branding materials for small businesses. I have my own office but I also work from home sometimes.

questions.question: Your friend just lost their job. How would you talk about their situation politely in English?
questions.hint: 想想 between jobs 和 unemployed 的语气区别，哪个更委婉？
questions.sampleAnswer: My friend is currently between jobs. He used to work for a marketing agency, but the company downsized. He's confident that he'll find a new position soon because he has a lot of experience in digital marketing.
